description: anvilml-scheduler: fix test isolation (pool max_connections, serial removal, multi_thread runtime)
context: job_store.rs: setup_pool() — use SqlitePoolOptions::new().max_connections(1).connect_with(SqliteConnectOptions::new().filename(":memory:").create_if_missing(true)).await (single-connection pool); remove use serial_test::serial; drop all 6 #[serial]. scheduler.rs: select_worker-only tests (test_select_auto_*, test_select_cpu*, test_select_preference_*) — drop #[serial], keep #[tokio::test]. All remaining tests — use #[tokio::test(flavor="multi_thread",worker_threads=2)]. Cargo.toml: drop serial_test from [dev-dependencies]. cargo test -p anvilml-scheduler --features mock-hardware exits 0.

description: backend: fix test isolation (serial removal, multi_thread runtime, temp_env cleanup)
context: api_ws_lifecycle.rs, api_cancel.rs, api_delete.rs: remove use serial_test; remove all #[serial]; change #[tokio::test] to #[tokio::test(flavor="multi_thread",worker_threads=2)] on every test fn. preflight_check.rs: same serial+runtime changes; in job_submit_rejected_when_preflight_fails replace bare std::env::remove_var("ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK") at top with temp_env::async_with_vars([("ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK",None::<&str>)],async{<body>}).await. backend/Cargo.toml: remove serial_test={workspace=true} from [dev-dependencies]. cargo test -p backend --features mock-hardware exits 0.

description: anvilml: verify full workspace test suite green after P904 isolation fixes
context: Verification-only — no source changes unless a failure is directly caused by P904-A1/A2 (document any such fix). Run all six gates: cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware; cargo clippy --workspace --features mock-hardware -- -D warnings; cargo clippy --bin anvilml -- -D warnings; cargo fmt --all -- --check; cargo check --workspace --features mock-hardware --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu; cargo check --bin anvilml --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu. All must exit 0. Record per-crate test counts in implement report.
